pdf_validation.visual_check: Rendered pages 1 and 8 checked for legibility, margins, table alignment, headings, source-basis text and footers.

controls: The cost build does not change live IFS portal finance fields.
Partner budgets, collaborator costs, hardware access, vessel costs, farm costs, match funding and facility costs remain excluded until evidenced.
Other-direct-cost reserve values are staging values only and must be replaced by eligible quotes, invoices or records before grant claim.
Travel is zero unless actual journeys are evidenced.
